series_metadata.series_description: (a) Corporate PACs & non-candidate committees yearly filings required by federal law. (b) Candidates & committees financial filings as required by federal law.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Filings required by R.C. 3517.107 will be retained for six (6) years, then destroyed. ; Paper: Filings required by R.C. 3517.107 will be retained on-site for six (6) years, then destroyed., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Trash
